creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
I am excited to witness history unfold at the Future Aviation Forum 2024 in Riyadh this week! Saudia Group’s epic announcement with Airbus has set the skies ablaze with the largest aircraft deal in Saudi Arabia’s aviation history! Picture this:105 cutting-edge aircraft, including (54) A321neo for Saudia and (51) for flyadeal, soaring into the future of aviation ✨✈️🌎🌍🇸🇦✨

This deal supports Saudi Vision 2030, aiming to welcome 330 million guests, explore 250 destinations, and host 150 million visitors by 2030! Plus, it will enhance the Hajj and Umrah pilgrim experiences for 30 million souls.

Get ready for a journey beyond imagination with their sleek new aircraft, featuring luxurious amenities and in-flight Wi-Fi. With their AI-powered “Travel Companion,” your journey is personalized from take-off to touchdown. 

Join me on this exhilarating journey as Saudia reach for the stars and redefine the future of aviation! @saudi_airlines 

#SaudiaGroup #Airbus#Saudia #flyadeal #SaudiVision2030 #Investment #GuestExperience #ThisIsHowWeFly
